category_sources: Official repository https://github.com/licensee/licensed says Licensed caches licenses of dependencies and checks their status.
source_facts.description says licensed caches and verifies dependency licenses.
display_name_sources: Official repository https://github.com/licensee/licensed uses the display name Licensed.
docs_sources: Official README at https://github.com/licensee/licensed#readme links to getting started, command, configuration, and sources documentation under the repository docs directory.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has value https://github.com/licensee/licensed; per instruction, repo is returned as null.
tags_sources: Official repository https://github.com/licensee/licensed lists licensing, dependencies, and license-management topics and describes Licensed as a Ruby gem.
source_facts.description identifies dependency license cache and verification.
